title: Oscars 2026 Winners: The Full List - Hollywood Reporter
text: Michael B. Jordan won the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 98th Oscars for his role in Sinners. According to The Hollywood Reporter's coverage, Jordan's win was among four Oscars that Sinners took home that evening. The film, directed by Ryan Coogler, also earned awards for best original screenplay, best original score, and best cinematography. Jordan's victory was announced during the ceremony, which took place on March 15, 2026, at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles and was hosted by Conan O'Brien. This marked Jordan's first career Academy Award nomination and win.
